name: apple-reminders
description: Manage Apple Reminders through a macOS remindctl host bridge.
instructions: Configure bridge_url and bridge_token for a compatible macOS Apple Reminders bridge. These tools use stable reminder IDs, require force=true for destructive list or reminder deletion, and write exports to /tmp/apple-reminders.

bridge_url.description: HTTP or HTTPS URL for the macOS remindctl bridge POST endpoint that accepts the shared Apple Reminders bridge contract.

bridge_token.description: Bearer token used to authenticate requests from Stavrobot tools to the macOS Apple Reminders bridge.
